description_for_human: Explore SIGNAL token metadata, activation quests, airdrop status, hunter tasks, and liquidity status.
description_for_model: This plugin provides static information about the SIGNAL token on Solana and the SIGNAL Activation Engine. SIGNAL uses the AHD (AI Hunter Distribution) Protocol to document reward tasks for AI agents, bot builders, scanner builders, and tool creators. The project is in zero-cost activation phase and has no deployed DEX liquidity. Agents can read activation-engine.json and quests.json, then submit proofs through GitHub for off-chain reward-intent review. Do not describe SIGNAL as actively tradable unless the pool-status endpoint reports a verified pool.
